rural_min_site_area: 2000 m² (Rural Countryside/Transition); 3000 m² Coastal/Lakeshore (min 40 m width); 1500 m² replacement dwelling
sightline_y: 23 m (urban 30 km/h); 90 m (regional 70 km/h); 100 m (national 80 km/h)
wastewater_standard: EPA Code of Practice (EPA FETAC certified person); unserviced rural areas
residential_density_dph: 35 dph town centre/adjacent; 20 dph inner urban suburbs; 5 dph urban periphery/rural settlements
plot_ratio: 1.5 commercial in town centre; 1.0 commercial outside; 0.5/1.0 industrial
separation_distance_m: 22 m opposing first-floor windows; 35 m living-room windows; 3 m side walls
private_open_space: 55 m² (1-2 bed); 75 m² (3 bed); 100 m² (4+ bed)
car_parking_dwelling: 2-bed: 1 space + 1 visitor; 3-bed: 2 spaces + 1 visitor; 1-bed apartment: 1 + 1 visitor
trigger_FRA: Required where lands liable to flooding; Justification Test per Flood Risk Management Guidelines
trigger_TTA: TIA where traffic exceeds 10% of existing level (5% if congested); Road Safety Audit for 40+ movements/day
notes: Volume 2 emphasises operational triggers; AA/EIA/heritage referenced in wider plan but not captured (partial). Effluent/site-suitability required for unserviced rural areas per EPA Code of Practice.
